  • Uses of XmlMetaProvider in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html that implement XmlMetaProvider
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HtmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as HTML documents.
    class 
    HtmlParser
    Parses text generated by the HtmlSerializer class back into a POJO model.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Simple
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.SimpleReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
    class 
    HtmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
    class 
    HtmlStrippedDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as stripped HTML.

  • Uses of XmlMetaProvider in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

    Subinterfaces of XmlMetaProvider in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    RdfMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to RdfClassMeta, RdfBeanMeta, and RdfBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena that implement XmlMetaProvider
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonLdParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing JSON-LD into POJOs.
    class 
    JsonLdSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to JSON-LD format.
    class 
    N3Parser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N3 (Notation3) into POJOs.
    class 
    N3Serializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N3 (Notation3) format.
    class 
    NQuadsParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Quads into POJOs.
    class 
    NQuadsSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Quads format.
    class 
    NTripleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Triples into POJOs.
    class 
    NTripleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Triples notation.
    class 
    RdfJsonParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/JSON into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfJsonSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/JSON notation.
    class 
    RdfParser
    Parses RDF into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfProtoParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    class 
    RdfProtoSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    class 
    RdfSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to RDF.
    class 
    RdfStreamParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    class 
    RdfStreamSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    class 
    RdfThriftParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    class 
    RdfThriftSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    class 
    RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML-Abbrev (abbreviated XML notation).
    class 
    RdfXmlParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/XML into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfXmlSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML (standard XML notation).
    class 
    TriGParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriG into POJOs.
    class 
    TriGSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriG format.
    class 
    TriXParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriX (XML) into POJOs.
    class 
    TriXSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriX (XML) format.
    class 
    TurtleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing Turtle into POJOs.
    class 
    TurtleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to Turtle format.
